lines.speaker: Miner
lines.text: Gah! Trolls everywhere. There's no escape!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You could just leave the mine.

lines.speaker: Miner
lines.text: Oh, I'd never thought of that.

lines.speaker: Miner
lines.text: This place rocks!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No it doesn't, it stays perfectly still.

lines.speaker: Miner
lines.text: Bah! Be quiet, pedant.

lines.speaker: Miner
lines.text: High hoe, high hoe!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Why are you singing about farming implements at altitude?

lines.speaker: Miner
lines.text: I don't know, I've never thought about it. Ask my Dad, he taught me the song.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How's your prospecting going?

lines.speaker: Miner
lines.text: Mine's going pretty well.

lines.speaker: Miner
lines.text: Mine? Mine...you get it?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh, I got it. That doesn't make it funny though.

lines.speaker: Miner
lines.text: Suit yourself.

lines.speaker: Miner
lines.text: I've been here for two days straight. When I close my eyes I see rocks.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Why would anyone stay here for so long?

lines.speaker: Miner
lines.text: I fear the outside. I fear the big light.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh dear. Being underground for so long may have driven you mad.

lines.speaker: Miner
lines.text: My back is killing me!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Could be worse, it could be the trolls killing you.

lines.speaker: Miner
lines.text: How very droll.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No, troll.

lines.speaker: Miner
lines.text: Bah! I resist your attempts at jollity.
